arts.ttl: Nine players could miss Man City vs Arsenal clash after Kevin De Bruyne injury scare
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is Manchester City's latest injury concern after being subbed at half-time with an issue against Inter in the Champions League with Arsenal also without a number of stars

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal player arrested over importing more than $700,000 worth of cannabis
arts.sum: Sky News report that the former Arsenal player was detained on suspicion of orchestrating the attempted import of cannabis from Thailand through Stansted Airport. Professional footballer Jay Emmanuel-Thomas was arrested by National Crime Agency officers on Wednesday morning in a drugs operation worth close to $800,000 (£600,000) .

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan reveals Arsenal hope amid Man City FFP charges fear
arts.sum: Former Crystal Palace chairman and talkSPORT host Simon Jordan has expressed his hope that Arsenal will be victorious over Manchester City on Sunday but not due to the club's current Financial Fair Play (FFP) hearing. In February 2023, the Premier League charged City with 115 breaches of FFP rules.

arts.ttl: Arsenal add 41 players to Champions League squad list ahead of Atalanta game
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has added 41 players to his squad list for tonight's Champions League opener against Atalanta. Among those named on the B List are Ethan Nwaneri and Myles Lewis-Skelly who have become integrated members of the first-team squad.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: 14-year-old wonderkid breaks European record
arts.sum: He made his debut for Arsenal's Under-18s last year when he was 13 years old, being developed by academy head coach Jack Wilshere. 14-year-old Arsenal wonderkid breaks European record

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Arsenal preview: injuries, stats, fantasy, news
arts.sum: One of the biggest games of the Premier League season is upon us. Here's everything you need to know as Manchester City prepare to host Arsenal.

arts.ttl: ‘That was it’: Mikel Arteta shares what Raheem Sterling said to him when he first called about joining Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal pulled off one of the most dramatic deadline day deals in recent memory this summer as Raheem Sterling arrived at the Emirates on loan...

arts.ttl: 8 players who could miss Man City vs Arsenal as Mikel Arteta deals with injury blow
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola will be waiting for an update on Kevin De Bruyne's fitness after the midfielder was withdrawn at half-time during City's draw with Inter Milan in the Champions League on Wednesday night. Arsenal and Manchester City will be forced to deal with injury concerns going into this weekend's Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne injury: Why Arsenal will be relieved if Man City star is ruled out of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes a look at why the potential injury absence of Kevin De Bruyne would be a major blow for Man City and a huge boost for Arsenal ahead of Sunday's Premier League showdown.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta expected to bring two Arsenal players into his starting line-up vs Atalanta tonight - Sky journalist
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is expected to bring Gabriel Jesus and Raheem Sterling into his Arsenal side to face Atalanta in the Champions League.
